title: New ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure
description: Security researchers have identified a new ransomware variant specifically designed to target cloud-based infrastructure. The campaign uses compromised CI/CD pipelines to deploy malicious code.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure could lead to significant data loss, operational downtime, and financial damage. Compromised CI/CD pipelines may result in widespread deployment of malicious code across cloud environments.
recommended_actions: Implement strict access controls and monitor CI/CD pipelines for unusual activity.
Regularly back up critical data and ensure backups are stored offline or in secure environments.
Deploy advanced endpoint detection and response (EDR) solutions to detect and mitigate ransomware threats early.

title: Show HN: Open-source vulnerability scanner
description: New tool automatically scans dependencies for known vulnerabilities and suggests patches. Gaining traction in the security community.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with low severity.

title: A vulnerability has been found in code-projects Simple Laundry System 1.0. This affects an...
description: A vulnerability has been found in code-projects Simple Laundry System 1.0. This affects an unknown part of the file /checkupdatestatus.php. The manipulation of the argument serviceId leads to cross site scripting. It is possible to initiate the attack remotely. The exploit has been disclosed to the public and may be used.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-6150.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-6149.

title: A vulnerability was determined in code-projects Vehicle Showroom Management System 1.0. This...
description: A vulnerability was determined in code-projects Vehicle Showroom Management System 1.0. This issue affects some unknown processing of the file /util/StaffAddingFunction.php. This manipulation of the argument STAFF_ID causes sql injection. The attack can be initiated remotely. The exploit has been publicly disclosed and may be utilized.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows remote attackers to perform SQL injection, potentially leading to unauthorized access, data leakage, or manipulation of sensitive information within the Vehicle Showroom Management System.
recommended_actions: Immediately update or patch the Vehicle Showroom Management System to address the vulnerability if a fix is available.
Implement input validation and sanitization for all user-supplied data to prevent SQL injection attacks.
Monitor system logs for unusual activity or signs of exploitation and restrict access to the affected file (/util/StaffAddingFunction.php) temporarily.

title: A security flaw has been discovered in farion1231 cc-switch up to 3.12.3. Affected by this issue...
description: A security flaw has been discovered in farion1231 cc-switch up to 3.12.3. Affected by this issue is some unknown functionality of the file src-tauri/src/proxy/server.rs of the component ProxyServer. The manipulation results in permissive cross-domain policy with untrusted domains. The attack can be executed remotely. The exploit has been released to the public and may be used for attacks.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in farion1231 cc-switch up to version 3.12.3 allows remote attackers to exploit a permissive cross-domain policy, potentially enabling unauthorized access to sensitive data or systems.
recommended_actions: Immediately upgrade farion1231 cc-switch to the latest patched version beyond 3.12.3.
Implement strict cross-domain policies and review server configurations for potential misconfigurations.
Monitor systems for unusual activity and apply intrusion detection mechanisms to detect exploitation attempts.

title: A vulnerability was identified in tushar-2223 Hotel Management System up to...
description: A vulnerability was identified in tushar-2223 Hotel Management System up to bb1f3b3666124b888f1e4bcf51b6fba9fbb01d15. Affected by this vulnerability is an unknown functionality of the file /admin/roomdelete.php. The manipulation of the argument ID leads to sql injection. Remote exploitation of the attack is possible. The exploit is publicly available and might be used. This product follows a rolling release approach for continuous delivery, so version details for affected or updated releases are

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows for SQL injection via the 'ID' parameter in the /admin/roomdelete.php file, potentially leading to unauthorized access, data exfiltration, or database manipulation. As the exploit is publicly available, the risk of exploitation is heightened.
affected_industries: Small and Medium Enterprises (SMEs) using the software
recommended_actions: Immediately update the tushar-2223 Hotel Management System to the latest patched version, if available.
Implement input validation and parameterized queries to mitigate SQL injection vulnerabilities.
Monitor logs for unusual activity, particularly around the /admin/roomdelete.php endpoint, and consider deploying a Web Application Firewall (WAF).

title: A vulnerability was detected in code-projects Vehicle Showroom Management System 1.0. Affected by...
description: A vulnerability was detected in code-projects Vehicle Showroom Management System 1.0. Affected by this vulnerability is an unknown functionality of the file /util/MonthTotalReportUpdateFunction.php. Performing a manipulation of the argument BRANCH_ID results in sql injection. The attack is possible to be carried out remotely. The exploit is now public and may be used.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows attackers to perform SQL injection via the BRANCH_ID parameter, potentially leading to unauthorized access, data exfiltration, or database manipulation. Since the exploit is public, the risk of exploitation is significantly increased.
recommended_actions: Immediately apply input validation and sanitization for the BRANCH_ID parameter to prevent SQL injection.
Update the Vehicle Showroom Management System to the latest patched version if available, or contact the vendor for a security update.
Implement a web application firewall (WAF) to detect and block SQL injection attempts.

title: Deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability in Samsung Open Source Escargot Java Script...
description:
Deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability in Samsung Open Source Escargot Java Script allows denial of service condition via process abort.

This issue affects escarogt prior to commit hash 

97e8115ab1110bc502b4b5e4a0c689a71520d335

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability in Samsung Open Source Escargot JavaScript could lead to a denial of service condition by causing the process to abort. This may disrupt operations and availability of services relying on the affected software.
recommended_actions: Upgrade to the latest version of Escargot JavaScript that includes the fix (commit hash 97e8115ab1110bc502b4b5e4a0c689a71520d335).
Implement input validation and sanitization to prevent deserialization of untrusted data.
Monitor systems for unusual process behavior and establish alerts for potential denial of service conditions.

title: A security vulnerability has been detected in Tenda F451 1.0.0.7_cn_svn7958. Impacted is the...
description: A security vulnerability has been detected in Tenda F451 1.0.0.7_cn_svn7958. Impacted is the function frmL7ImForm of the file /goform/L7Im. The manipulation of the argument page leads to stack-based buffer overflow. It is possible to initiate the attack remotely. The exploit has been disclosed publicly and may be used.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in Tenda F451 firmware allows remote attackers to exploit a stack-based buffer overflow, potentially leading to system crashes, unauthorized access, or remote code execution. Public disclosure of the exploit increases the likelihood of widespread attacks.
recommended_actions: Immediately update the firmware to the latest version if a patch is available.
Implement network segmentation to isolate vulnerable devices from critical systems.
Monitor network traffic for unusual activity and apply intrusion detection/prevention systems.

title: A flaw has been found in chatboxai chatbox up to 1.20.0. This impacts the function...
description: A flaw has been found in chatboxai chatbox up to 1.20.0. This impacts the function StdioClientTransport of the file src/main/mcp/ipc-stdio-transport.ts of the component Model Context Protocol Server Management System. Executing a manipulation of the argument args/env can lead to os command injection. The attack can be launched remotely. The exploit has been published and may be used. The project was informed of the problem early through an issue report but has not responded yet.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary OS commands through the manipulation of input arguments, potentially leading to full system compromise. This could result in data breaches, unauthorized access, or disruption of services.
recommended_actions: Immediately upgrade to a patched version of chatboxai chatbox if available or temporarily disable the affected functionality.
Implement input sanitization and validation as a mitigation measure to prevent exploitation of the vulnerability.
Monitor for unusual activity and apply intrusion detection systems to identify potential exploitation attempts.

title: CVE-2026-5618 - A vulnerability was detected in kalcaddle kodbox up to 1.64. This affects an unknown function of the
description: A vulnerability was detected in kalcaddle kodbox up to 1.64. This affects an unknown function of the component shareMake/shareCheck. Performing a manipulation of the argument siteFrom/siteTo results in server-side request forgery. The attack is possible to be carried out remotely. The complexity of an attack is rather high. The exploitability is reported as difficult. The exploit is now public and may be used. The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure but did not respond in any way.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in kalcaddle kodbox up to version 1.64 allows for server-side request forgery (SSRF) via manipulation of specific arguments. This could enable attackers to access internal systems, exfiltrate sensitive data, or perform unauthorized actions on behalf of the server. The attack complexity is high, but the exploit is public, increasing the likelihood of exploitation.
recommended_actions: Immediately update kalcaddle kodbox to the latest version if a patch is available, or apply any workarounds provided by the vendor.
Implement strict input validation and sanitization for all user-supplied data to mitigate SSRF risks.

Monitor server logs and network traffic for unusual activity, particularly requests to internal or unexpected endpoints, and consider deploying a web application firewall (WAF) to detect and block malicious requests.

title: CVE-2026-5616 - A security vulnerability has been detected in JeecgBoot 3.9.0/3.9.1. The impacted element is an unkn
description: A security vulnerability has been detected in JeecgBoot 3.9.0/3.9.1. The impacted element is an unknown function of the file jeecg-boot/jeecg-module-system/jeecg-system-biz/src/main/java/org/jeecg/modules/airag/JeecgBizToolsProvider.java of the component AI Chat Module. Such manipulation leads to missing authentication. The attack can be executed remotely. The name of the patch is b7c9aeba7aefda9e008ea8fe4fc3daf08d0c5b39/2c1cc88b8d983868df8c520a343d6ff4369d9e59. It is best practice to apply a patch to resolve this issue. The project fixed the issue with a commit which shall be part of the next official release.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-5616.

title: CVE-2026-5615 - A weakness has been identified in givanz Vvvebjs up to 2.0.5. The affected element is an unknown fun
description: A weakness has been identified in givanz Vvvebjs up to 2.0.5. The affected element is an unknown function of the file upload.php of the component File Upload Endpoint. This manipulation of the argument uploadAllowExtensions causes cross site scripting. Remote exploitation of the attack is possible. The exploit has been made available to the public and could be used for attacks. Patch name: 8cac22cff99b8bc701c408aa8e887fa702755336. Applying a patch is the recommended action to fix this issue. The vendor was contacted early, responded in a very professional manner and quickly released a fixed version of the affected product.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-5615.
